SELECT
    "CDSCode",
    ("Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)") AS eligible_free_rate
FROM (
    SELECT
        "CDSCode",
        "Free Meal Count (K-12)",
        "Enrollment (K-12)",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC) AS rn
    FROM frpm
    WHERE "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
      AND "Free Meal Count (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
) sub
WHERE rn IN (10, 11);	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT

        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.CDSCode)
         FROM schools s
         INNER JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
         INNER JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
         WHERE s.DOC = '54' AND s.County = 'Orange')

        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.CDSCode)

    WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
),
top_names AS (
    SELECT first_name
    FROM admin_names
    GROUP BY first_name
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 2
)
SELECT
    an.first_name,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT an.District) AS districts
FROM admin_names an
JOIN top_names tn ON an.first_name = tn.first_name
GROUP BY an.first_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT DISTINCT d.account_id,
       (SELECT max_avg.avg_salary - min_avg.avg_salary
        FROM (SELECT MAX(dist.A11) AS avg_salary
              FROM client c
              JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
              WHERE c.gender = 'F') AS max_avg,
             (SELECT MIN(dist.A11) AS avg_salary
              FROM client c
              JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
              WHERE c.gender = 'F'
                AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')) AS min_avg) AS gap
FROM client c
JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
  AND dist.A11 = (SELECT MIN(dist2.A11)
                  FROM client c2
                  JOIN district dist2 ON c2.district_id = dist2.district_id
                  WHERE c2.gender = 'F'
                    AND c2.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F'));	----- bird -----	financial

FROM (
    SELECT t.balance
    FROM trans t
    WHERE t.account_id = (
        SELECT a.account_id
        FROM loan l
        JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
        WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05'
        ORDER BY l.loan_id ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )
      AND t.date = '1993-03-22'
    ORDER BY t.trans_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
) b_start,
(
    SELECT t.balance
    FROM trans t
    WHERE t.account_id = (
        SELECT a.account_id
        FROM loan l
        JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
        WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05'
        ORDER BY l.loan_id ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )
      AND t.date = '1998-12-27'
    ORDER BY t.trans_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
) b_end;	----- bird -----	financial

    COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) AS percentage

JOIN district dist ON dist.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE dist.A11 > 10000;	----- bird -----	financial
169:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
              SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 /
              SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)
    END AS growth_rate_percent
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M'
  AND strftime('%Y', l.date) IN ('1996','1997');	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT 
    CAST(max_combo.max_cnt AS REAL) * 100.0 / total.total_cnt AS percentage
FROM (
    SELECT MAX(cnt) AS max_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            MIN(a.element) AS elem1,
            MAX(a.element) AS elem2,
            COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM connected c
        JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id
        JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
        GROUP BY c.bond_id
    ) pair_counts
    GROUP BY elem1, elem2
) max_combo,
(
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_cnt FROM bond
) total;	----- bird -----	toxicology

         ELSE 'non-carcinogenic' 
       END AS majority
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id 
      FROM atom 
      WHERE lower(element) = 'ca') AS ca
JOIN molecule m ON ca.molecule_id = m.molecule_id	----- bird -----	toxicology

) AS avg_fastest_lap_seconds

944:
WITH race AS (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE year = 2008
      AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
champ AS (
    SELECT time
    FROM results
    WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race)
      AND position = 1
      AND time IS NOT NULL
    LIMIT 1
),
last AS (
    SELECT time
    FROM results
    WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race)
      AND time IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY position DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT ((last_sec - champ_sec) / last_sec) * 100 AS percent_faster
FROM (
    SELECT
        (CAST(substr(ch.time,1,2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
         CAST(substr(ch.time,4,2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
         CAST(substr(ch.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
         CAST(substr(ch.time,10) AS REAL) / 1000) AS champ_sec,
        (CAST(substr(l.time,1,2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
         CAST(substr(l.time,4,2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
         CAST(substr(l.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
         CAST(substr(l.time,10) AS REAL) / 1000) AS last_sec
    FROM champ ch, last l
);	----- bird -----	formula_1

1149:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_inpatient,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_outpatient,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 /
             SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    END AS deviation_percentage,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 
             SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'In-patient'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) < 
             SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'Outpatient'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS more_group
FROM Patient;	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

1451:
WITH member_events AS (
    SELECT e.link_to_member AS member_id,
           COUNT(DISTINCT ev.event_id) AS event_cnt
    FROM expense e
    JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
    JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
    GROUP BY e.link_to_member
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ev.event_id) > 1
),
member_max_expense AS (
    SELECT e.link_to_member AS member_id,
           MAX(e.cost) AS max_cost
    FROM expense e
    JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
    JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
    WHERE e.link_to_member IN (SELECT member_id FROM member_events)
    GROUP BY e.link_to_member
)
SELECT m.member_id,
       m.first_name,
       m.last_name,
       me.max_cost
FROM member_max_expense me
JOIN member m ON m.member_id = me.member_id
WHERE me.max_cost = (SELECT MAX(max_cost) FROM member_max_expense)
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	student_club

SELECT
    (SELECT min_cons FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_cons) AS min_cons
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
            FROM customers c
            JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'SME')
    -
    (SELECT min_cons FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_cons) AS min_cons
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
            FROM customers c
            JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT min_cons FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_cons) AS min_cons
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
            FROM customers c
            JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'LAM')
    -
    (SELECT min_cons FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_cons) AS min_cons
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
            FROM customers c
            JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT min_cons FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_cons) AS min_cons
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
            FROM customers c
            JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'KAM')
    -
    (SELECT min_cons FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_cons) AS min_cons
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
            FROM customers c
            JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
SELECT 'biggest' AS category, Segment, pct_increase
FROM (
    WITH seg_cons AS (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2012,
               SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2013
        FROM yearmonth ym
        JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
        GROUP BY c.Segment
    ), pct AS (
        SELECT Segment,
               ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2013) AS pct_increase
        FROM seg_cons
        WHERE cons_2013 != 0
    )
    SELECT Segment, pct_increase
    FROM pct
    ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lowest' AS category, Segment, pct_increase
FROM (
    WITH seg_cons AS (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2012,
               SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2013
        FROM yearmonth ym
        JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
        GROUP BY c.Segment
    ), pct AS (
        SELECT Segment,
               ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2013) AS pct_increase
        FROM seg_cons
        WHERE cons_2013 != 0
    )
    SELECT Segment, pct_increase
    FROM pct
    ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
    LIMIT 1
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

         FROM yearmonth

        (SELECT SUM(Consumption)
         FROM yearmonth
         WHERE CustomerID = tc.CustomerID

    FROM (
